name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-6
title: sync-check.py rebuilds settings.json without preserving permissions block, silently destroying manual permission grants
description: When the Stop hook (sync-check.py) detects surface drift, it rebuilds .claude/settings.json from its canonical source but drops the permissions block entirely. Any permissions added to settings.json (e.g. via Write) are silently overwritten at end of turn. Reproduced: wrote a permissions.allow array with 25 Bash rules; Stop hook fired, reported 'Surface drift detected — workspace rebuilt from sources', and the permissions block was gone. Root cause: sync-check.py rebuild does not merge existing permissions into the regenerated file.
